delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this competition?
delete.label: Deleting competition

execution.all: Matches have been moved. All players were notified.
execution.all_missing: Matches have been moved. Not all players could be notified, as they did not specify an email address.
execution.single: Match has been moved. All players were notified.
execution.single_missing: Match has been moved. Not all players could be notified, as they did not specify an email address.

preparation.all: All competitions have been published. All players were notified.
preparation.all_missing: All competitions have been published. Not all players could be notified, as they did not specify an email address.
preparation.consider_all:
Consider using the function "Publish all".
This gives the players a combined E-Mail, leading to less spam.
preparation.single: Competition has been published. All players were notified.
preparation.single_missing: Competition has been published. Not all players could be notified, as they did not specify an email address.
preparation.warning:
Publishing notifies all players via E-Mail.
Afterwards, you are more limited in editing the competition.

scheduling.error_cont_not_scheduled: All matches need to be scheduled before continuing

signup.label: Sign Up
signup.not_found: Can't find yourself? Maybe you forgot to register yourself.

participants.empty: It seems that no one has signed up yet...

state.not_started: Registration hasn't started yet. Signup phase starts on

warning.register_before: Players need to be registered before signup

warning.knockout_not_assigned: Not all players have been assigned yet
warning.not_yet_published: You need to publish the competition before entering results
warning.prepare_reset: All drawn and scheduled matches will be reset. Only assigned teams will be kept. Do you really want to reset the preparation?
warning.prepared_not_published: The competition has been prepared, but not published so far. You can reset the progress to restart the preparation.
warning.prepared_published: The competition has been prepared and published. You can no longer revoke preparation.

court.no_courts_admin: Go to the settings to create them.
court.no_courts_no_admin: Ask your admin to create them.
court.not_selected: All fields need to be filled
court.warning_select_courts: You need to select a court before you can schedule matches.

group.label: group
group.min_two_teams: Every group needs at least 2 teams

create.disclaimer: By creating a player, you agree to the Privacy Policy. Additionally, you agree that your name will be visible to other visitors. Your date of birth and email address will never be displayed publicly.
create.follow_up: Thank you for registration! Please confirm your e-mail with the verification link, we sent you to your email.
create.label: Create player

created.failed_detail: Please check your input and if your player already exists.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this player?
delete.label: Deleting player

verification.failure: This verification link doesn't seem to be correct.

email.correct: Please input a valid mail address

error.delete: Deleting player failed. Player probably already part of some matches

settings.admin_needed_summary: Players need to be verified before being able to sign up to a competition
settings.backup_download_warning: Downloading a backup may time some minutes. Please be patient.
settings.backup_restore_warning: Restoring a backup deletes all existing data. Please make sure you have a backup before restoring.

error.wrong_dates: Begin of game phase needs to be after end of registration phase

invalid.date: Field is not a valid date
